How it works

From upload to optimization in minutes.

A structured workflow that surfaces exactly what matters — no noise, no vague feedback.

01
Upload your resume

PDF or DOCX. Our parser extracts and structures every section with high accuracy.

02
Get your ATS score

Multi-dimensional scoring across 6 criteria: skills, experience, education, keywords, formatting, and impact.

03
Match a job description

Paste any JD. See exact overlap, missing keywords, and semantic alignment.

04
Run recruiter simulation

Rule-based engine models the real 30-second recruiter review. Shortlist probability and red flags.

05
Optimize with precision

Concrete, ranked recommendations. Track score improvement after every edit.

Features

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

ATS Scoring

Six-dimensional scoring model. Understand exactly how automated screening systems evaluate your resume.

JD Matching

Paste any job description. Keyword overlap, missing skills, and semantic alignment in seconds.

Recruiter Simulation

Rule-based recruiter engine models real screening decisions. Shortlist probability and red flag detection.

Version Comparison

Compare two resume versions side by side. See exactly what changed, improved, or regressed.

Score History

Track ATS score progression over time. Measure the impact of every edit with data.

Resume Library

Store multiple resume versions. Maintain separate resumes for different roles and companies.

Ready to analyze your resume?

No credit card required. Results in under 30 seconds.
